category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a capability-based sandbox shell for AI agents with OS-enforced isolation; official docs describe kernel-enforced sandboxing for AI agents, MCP, and LLM workloads.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nono; official GitHub repository and docs use nono/Nono.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to full documentation at docs.nono.sh, which redirects to nono.sh/docs/introduction.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CLI sandboxing; official docs describe zero-trust, kernel-enforced sandboxing for AI agents and runtime security.
